listing.title: Construction AI Suite — RFIs, Daily Logs, Estimating
listing.shortDescription: 5 AI plugins for construction PMs. RFI responses, daily log reports, cost estimating, change order management, and safety compliance.
listing.longDescription: The Construction AI Suite equips project managers and superintendents with AI workflows built for the job site. RFI Response System drafts technically precise RFI answers and syncs with Procore; Daily Log Reporter converts field notes into formatted daily logs and progress photos summaries; Estimating Assistant builds line-item cost estimates from scope descriptions; Change Order Manager generates change order packages with justification and markup calculations; and Safety Compliance produces toolbox talk scripts, incident reports, and OSHA-aligned checklists. Each plugin ships with a system prompt tuned for construction terminology and a Codex config for Shopify-compatible delivery.
